name: aggressive
summary: High-trust autonomy — most tools allowed without prompting; denies only truly destructive operations.
when_to_use: Experienced teams, mature test suites, contained blast radius (branches, sandboxes). Not for production or unfamiliar codebases.

planner.note: Still required — no code without a plan.

verifier.note: Disabled in aggressive — assumes user trusts the agent to self-verify.

memory_rules: Standard engram protocol: proactive mem_save on every decision/bug/discovery.
Session summary mandatory — aggressive mode makes more unsupervised decisions, summary is the audit trail.
warnings: Do not run on main/master branches.
Always pair with a strong CI pipeline — aggressive assumes CI catches what gates don't.
